sn50.55:1.1: "Bhikkhus, just as the river Ganges slants, slopes, and inclines towards the east,sn.v.252so too a bhikkhu who develops and cultivates the five powers slants, slopes, and inclines towards Nibbāna.
sn50.55:1.2: "And how, bhikkhus, does a bhikkhu develop and cultivate the five powers so that he slants, slopes, and inclines towards Nibbāna? Here, bhikkhus, a bhikkhu develops the power of faith … the power of wisdom, which has as its final goal the removal of lust, the removal of hatred, the removal of delusion.
sn50.55:1.3: "It is in this way, bhikkhus, that a bhikkhu develops and cultivates the five powers so that he slants, slopes, and inclines towards Nibbāna."
